mapper.select: select count(*) from user
select count(*) from schedule
mapper.insert: insert into dashboard (stat_date, total_user_count, total_schedule_count) values (#{statDate}, #{userCount}, #{scheduleCount})
mapper.select: select coalesce( (select total_user_count from dashboard order by stat_date desc limit 1 ), 0 )
select coalesce( (select total_schedule_count from dashboard order by stat_date desc limit 1 ), 0 )
select count(*) from recommended_schedule
select count(*) from schedule where status = 'completed'
select count(*) from schedule where status = 'closed'
select * from ( select stat_date, total_user_count, total_schedule_count from dashboard order by stat_date desc limit 14 ) d order by stat_date asc

select max(stat_date) as stat_date, max(total_user_count) as total_user_count, max(total_schedule_count) as total_schedule_count from dashboard
group by year(stat_date), week(stat_date, 1)
order by stat_date

select max(stat_date) as stat_date, max(total_user_count) as total_user_count, max(total_schedule_count) as total_schedule_count from dashboard
group by year(stat_date), month(stat_date)
order by stat_date
select id, type, version, content, is_required as isRequired from terms order by id
select id as id, name as interestName, icon_name as iconName from interests order by id
mapper.update:
update schedule set is_public = case
when is_public = 1 then 0 else 1 end where id = #{scheduleId}
